name: agentic-suite
description: BUILD → GROW suite. Bundles ALL THREE skills in one install — conductor + agentic-app-builder (software) + agentic-worker (growth) + the shared 192-persona registry. For a single request needing both software AND growth work, the conductor builds and ships the product, hands off a factual brief, then runs the growth work (SEO/marketing/sales/research/content) grounded in what was built. In-session, no API key.
